entries.title: 1 Kings 12:3
entries.author: Adam Clarke (1760–1832)
entries.content: Verse 31 Let the heavens be glad - "Let the supreme angels be glad, and the inhabitants of the earth rejoice." - T. In this place the Targumist uses the Greek word αγγελοι, angels, in Hebrew letters thus, אנגלי angeley.

entries.title: 1 Kings 12:18
entries.author: Adam Clarke (1760–1832)
entries.content: Verse 5 But have gone from tent to tent - "I have transferred my tabernacle from Gilgal to Nob, from Nob to Shiloh, and from Shiloh to Gibeon." - Targum and Jarchi.
